global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent call to action and various text elements.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'CloudRoute' in a clean, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: A short line of text that reads 'Flexible booking options', displayed in a clear, readable font in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Booking details
elements.description: Another line of text that provides additional booking details, centered and visually distinct.

elements.label: Booking details
elements.description: A similar line of text providing more booking information, also centered and visually distinct.

elements.label: Booking options
elements.description: A line of text that describes booking options, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Booking details
elements.description: A line of text that provides further booking details, centered and visually distinct.

elements.label: Booking options
elements.description: A line of text that describes booking options, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Circular graphic
elements.description: A small circular graphic element, adding visual interest to the center of the ad.

elements.label: Circular graphic
elements.description: Another small circular graphic element, complementing the first and enhancing the design.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Order now', designed to attract attention at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip €9.9927 ons Order now

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'CloudRoute' in a clean, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: A small label indicating 'UGC', suggesting user-generated content, positioned at the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: CloudRoute, travel, native, bright and modern, booking options, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by body text in the center, and the call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: CloudRoute, UGC, Book your next trip, €9.99, Order now, Flexible booking options
